name: agent-guard-cli
description: Programmable guardrails for coding agents across Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, and CI workflows.

scripts.build: npm run clean && npm run build:ts && npm run build:action
scripts.build:action: esbuild src/github-action/run.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node20 --format=cjs --outfile=dist/action/index.cjs --banner:js='/* agent-guard GitHub Action bundle */'
scripts.validate:examples: npm run build && node dist/src/cli/main.js validate --rules presets/baseline.yml
